# kumpulenak

> Platform galeri video viral dan streaming dewasa (18+) premium yang cepat, bersih, dan dioptimalkan untuk perangkat mobile.

## Info & Links
- [Homepage](https://www.kumpulenak.web.id/)
- [How to Download](https://www.kumpulenak.web.id/howto)
- [About Us](https://www.kumpulenak.web.id/about)
- [Contact](https://www.kumpulenak.web.id/contact)
- [DMCA Takedown Policy](https://www.kumpulenak.web.id/dmca)

## Platform Overview
kumpulenak is a free, ad-supported adult video aggregator and streaming gallery. It specializes in trending viral adult content, Japanese Adult Video (JAV), amateur videos, and social media trends, streamed in high-definition (HD) quality. The platform features instant hover-to-play video previews and is highly optimized for mobile devices.

## Content Categories & Search Queries
The platform aggregates and catalogs content across several major tags:
- **Indonesian Viral**: Amateur and trending local adult content.
- **Japanese (JAV)**: Uncensored and censored Japanese adult videos.
- **Amateur & Homemade**: Homemade videos and amateur couple content.
- **Asian & East Asian**: Korean, Chinese, and Southeast Asian adult videos.
- **Other popular tags**: Hijab, student leaks, massage, outdoor, hotel, hotel tapes, and couple videos.

## Features
- **Instant Video Previews**: Muted MP4 video previews load automatically when hovering over video cards (desktop) or cycling thumbnails (mobile).
- **Fast CDN Streaming**: Assets and dynamic pages are cached globally using Cloudflare Pages to ensure fast page load times and optimal Core Web Vitals.
- **Telegram Integration**: Connected to a dedicated updates channel (t.me/missav_jav_english) for instant notifications.
